name: Mirror Abyss / 镜渊
validation: ES Module parse/import, adaptive fact retry/split classification, bounded prompt context, history batch sizing, deployment syntax/version and ZIP integrity checks passed
limitations: Original TypeScript project, package manifest and full source test suite were not present in the uploaded deploy archive.
fixes: reduce fact extraction character budget from 52000 to 18000
retry single-turn transient and protocol failures with exponential backoff
split failed multi-turn fact batches automatically instead of repeating the same oversized request
reduce history rebuild batches from 10-20 messages to 4-10 messages with a default of 6
cap previous active-table prompt context and prioritize focus, foundations, protected rows, active rows and current-turn mentions
bound stage fact, event registry, previous long-term record, summary and candidate prompt contexts
retry small and large summary transient failures and malformed plaintext tag protocols
keep non-gateway HTML errors non-retryable and preserve existing data on final failure
preserve model routing, admission, event memory and lorebook consistency behavior
